title: January 6
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 6''' is the 6th day of the year. 359 days (360 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Wayne Douglas Barlowe]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Johnny Yong Bosch]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Genevieve O'Reilly]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Hugh Skinner]] is born.
*[[2010]] – [[The Clone Wars 12|''The Clone Wars'' 12]] published.
*[[2012]] – "[[Escape from Kadavo]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Vader Chronicles]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Sabine's Art Attack]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Obi-Wan and Anakin 1|''Obi-Wan and Anakin'' 1]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[William Morgan Sheppard]] dies.
*[[2021]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 10|''Star Wars'' (2020) 10]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic (2021) 1|''The High Republic'' (2021) 1]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Apple Brook]] dies.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Ahsoka Rebel Jedi]]'' published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: Meet the Characters]]'' published.
<noinclude>
